title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Dr. Antonio J. Alcantara As Consultant on Environment and Natural Resources Program with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Twenty Thousand Pesos (P 20,000.00). Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 01/23/2023
